title: Doc's Whimscape Additions: Whimsical Charm
description: An unofficial Charm add-on for Whimscape!
body:
**Whimscape - now with a little bit of Charm!**
This Whimscape add-on is another part of my Whimscape Additions project. This add-on adds compatability with the Charm mod, which is a mod that adds features that enhance the vanilla experience without changing too much. NOTICE: I am aware that the trapped chests do not have unique textures within the inventory. I do not know how to fix this and cannot figure out how.
[![A horizontally long, light blue button with the words "Download Whimscape" on it, followed by an arrow pointing toa black and purple portal. On the left side of the button is a square icon depicting a large white "W" with a grassy scene behind it.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/37f9d79f3df9fa56ce348ccaed361b70dc9d365f.png)]([https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/whimscape](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/whimscape)) Check out my other addons! [![A horizontally long, copper orange button with the words "Friends + Foes Add-on" on it, followed by an arrow pointing to a black and purple portal. On the left side of the button is a square icon depicting a large white "W" with a coppper orange metal background..](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/40cfaba3267bd90207c0c00ef26cee6804de9198.png)](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/docs-whimscape-additions-friends-and-foes) [![A horizontally long, blue and golden brown button with the words "Even More Delight Add-on" on it, followed by an arror pointing to a black and purple portal. On the left side of the button is a square icon depicting a large white "W" with a field of wheat and a blue sky as a background.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a47c0bbcb91f50c2f413207d7facb39f2486a1c2.png)]([https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/docs-whimscape-additions-even-more-delight](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/docs-whimscape-additions-even-more-delight))
